title: Fans thought Gensyxa destroyed her new streaming setup until they noticed one detail
summary_full: Russian streamer Gensyxa's video of her streaming room flooding went viral, captivating millions who believed it was a genuine accident. The footage showed a rapid deluge, damaging expensive equipment and furniture, creating a sensation online. However, it later emerged the flooded room might have been a staged set for the video, sparking further discussion about its authenticity and safety.
